hot_topics.summary: Port and infrastructure developments are showing up alongside disruption coverage and can shape how stories are framed.
Fuel and energy language can turn operational disruption into procurement, pricing, and margin pressure conversations.
The story is moving inland, which makes it more relevant for shipper conversations beyond ocean freight.
Regional disruption is broadening beyond the strait headline into carrier updates, energy flows, and network risk.
Carrier and network changes are showing up as practical routing and service updates rather than just broad market commentary.

business_angles.title: `Port / capacity moves` is running above its recent baseline across high-trust, trade-press coverage. Port and infrastructure developments are showing up alongside disruption coverage and can shape how stories are framed.

`Fuel / energy pressure` is running above its recent baseline across high-trust, trade-press coverage. Fuel and energy language can turn operational disruption into procurement, pricing, and margin pressure conversations.

`Inland / intermodal spillover` is running above its recent baseline across high-trust, trade-press coverage. The story is moving inland, which makes it more relevant for shipper conversations beyond ocean freight.
Disruption language is no longer limited to ocean lanes; inland and intermodal knock-on effects are now part of the story.
